meta.title: NPC Test - Are You an NPC? | DopaBrain
meta.description: Are you an NPC or the Main Character? Take this quiz to find out where you fall on the NPC to Final Boss spectrum!

app.title: NPC Test
app.subtitle: Are you an NPC or the Main Character?
app.description: Answer 12 questions about your daily habits and social behavior to discover if you're living on autopilot or writing the script.

q1.text: What do you do when you enter a room full of strangers?
q1.a: Stand by the wall and observe
q1.b: Find someone I know and stick to them
q1.c: Start a conversation with the nearest person

q2.text: How do you order food at a restaurant?

q3.a: Walk the exact same path daily
q3.d: Walk like there's a soundtrack playing

q4.text: How do you handle awkward silences?
q4.a: Wait for someone else to talk
q4.d: Say something random and own it

q5.a: Same exact thing every single day
q5.d: Each day is a new episode

q6.text: Someone asks for your opinion. You say:
q6.a: I don't mind, whatever you want
q6.d: I have a full TED talk prepared

q7.text: How do you react when something embarrassing happens?
q7.d: Turn it into a story I tell everyone

q8.b: Reply hours later with 'sorry I just saw this'
q8.d: Voice notes, memes, essays, the whole package

q9.text: How do you pick what to watch or play?

q10.text: At a party, where are you?
q10.a: Petting the dog in the corner
q10.c: Moving between groups, talking to everyone
q10.d: Center of the dance floor telling stories

q12.text: What do people say about you?
q12.c: They're really fun to be around
q12.d: Everyone has a story about them

npc.name: Full NPC
npc.desc: You run into walls, repeat the same dialogue, and follow the exact same path every day. Your catchphrase is '...' and your idle animation is staring into space. But hey, every world needs NPCs — you keep the simulation running!

extra.name: Background Extra
extra.desc: You exist in the scene but nobody remembers your name. You're Villager #47 — technically present, technically alive, technically... there. You have the potential for a character arc, but you're still in the loading screen.

side.name: Side Character
side.desc: You've got memorable moments and people know your name. You're the friend everyone loves, the one with the catchphrases, but you haven't unlocked your final form yet. Your backstory episode is coming!

main.name: Main Character
main.desc: The camera follows YOU. Plot armor: activated. Every room you enter, the energy shifts. You've got the character development arc, the soundtrack, and at least three people rooting for you. Protagonist vibes only.

boss.name: Final Boss
boss.desc: You don't just play the game — you ARE the game. Reality bends around your decisions. When you walk in, even the main characters become NPCs. You've got multiple phases, a killer theme song, and everyone knows your name.

share.title: Share Your Result
share.text: I got "{tier}" ({score}%) on the NPC Test! Am I an NPC or the Main Character? Find out:
